question: The line chart shows annual sales from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the main limitation in interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is difficult to clearly see specific values and subtle changes over time.
options.B: Sales clearly increased at a constant rate every year from 1924 to 2024.
options.C: Sales peaked in 1975 and then steadily declined through 2024.
options.D: Sales stayed exactly the same from 1924 to 2024.

explanation: The chart shows sales rising to a peak around 1975 and then declining. Small visual elements can lead to misreading the trend as a steady increase.
